text.title: Business Analysis Planning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a planned delivery (not MVP / spike / pure-Scrum)?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: Will sponsor name a governance approver?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Halt; do not author the artefact.
Produce all five KA1 artefacts (T1-T5) in dependency order.

example.trace: context=planned-delivery → approver=amaia@acme.com → volatility=monthly → produce T1-T5 bundle.
